title: Phase 23 — Results-Only Growth Scoreboard
rule: Every action must tie to one measurable KPI. If an action type does not move metrics, it must be stopped or changed.

metrics.target_value: >=1 click on any content page (not homepage)
metrics.correction_rule: If 0 clicks: improve meta description. If still 0: accept page needs external authority (backlinks) to convert.

metrics.owner_engine: Content Click Engine + Internal Link Engine
metrics.action_being_tested: Above-fold CTA upgrades + internal link concentration
metrics.correction_rule: Stop content tweaks. Focus 100% on backlinks. Content quality is not the blocker — authority is.

metrics.action_being_tested: Internal links from indexed pages → real calculators
metrics.success_threshold: Real page impressions grow >20% in 21 days
metrics.failure_threshold: Real page impressions decline or flat for 21 days
metrics.correction_rule: Internal links are crawl improvement only. Need external authority (backlinks) for ranking improvement.
Without backlinks, internal-only SEO cannot move real calculator positions. Must get external links.

metrics.current_value: ~238 indexed total, but 8 real parents at 0 impressions
metrics.owner_engine: Indexing Engine (GSC UI) + Internal Link Engine
metrics.action_being_tested: 7 GSC UI indexing requests + internal link additions
metrics.success_threshold: >=2 of 7 requested pages become indexed AND show impressions
metrics.failure_threshold: 0 of 7 requested pages indexed OR indexed but 0 impressions
metrics.correction_rule: Indexing alone is insufficient. Indexed-but-invisible = authority gap. Need backlinks.

metrics.target_value: >=3 of 7 URLs change status by Day 14
metrics.action_being_tested: GSC UI indexing requests (one-time, no repeat)
metrics.correction_rule: If 0 movement: pages may have quality or crawl issues beyond indexing request. Investigate content quality + crawl budget.

metrics.current_value: 0 of 8 Group C pages have impressions
metrics.owner_engine: Internal Link Engine + Content Upgrade Engine
metrics.action_being_tested: Internal links from indexed pages + cross-calculator links
metrics.correction_rule: Indexed-but-invisible = Google sees pages but ranks them below page 10. Authority gap. Backlinks needed.

metrics.success_threshold: >=1 backlink OR embed usage by Jun 26
metrics.failure_threshold: 0 backlinks AND 0 embed uses by Jun 26
metrics.correction_rule: Revise pitch. Try different value angle. Consider HARO/journalist outreach for editorial links.

metrics.action_being_tested: Shorter value-first follow-up pitch (widget/embed offer, no backlink ask)
metrics.correction_rule: Cold outreach may not work for this niche. Try HARO/journalist outreach or guest posting.

metrics.current_value: 38 cumulative links added. 0 measurable ranking change yet.
metrics.target_value: >=1 linked page shows position improvement >5 points
metrics.action_being_tested: Contextual links from pages with impressions → real calculators and decisions
metrics.correction_rule: Internal links from 0-authority pages (QFINHUB) to 0-authority pages don't transfer meaningful authority. Need external links.

overall_verdict: QFINHUB is stuck in a 0-authority trap. Every metric points to the same root cause: NO BACKLINKS. Internal SEO (links, content, indexing requests) has been executed well but cannot overcome the authority gap. The ONLY path to measurable results is external links.
